task_completion.description: Verify that the Sygic GPS Navigation app is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic GPS Navigation app interface (such as the map view or main menu) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Settings menu is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Settings menu of the Sygic app is displayed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Route Planning settings section is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings screen specifically for 'Route Planning' or 'Route' preferences is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Avoid ferries' option is located on the screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Avoid ferries' is clearly visible in the list of route planning options.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Avoid ferries' option is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toggle switch next to 'Avoid ferries' is in the ON position, indicated by a blue color state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Sygic GPS Navigation app.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine Sygic app interface, not a web browser, text editor, or Android system settings search.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to change the setting.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal emulator or command-line interface is visible being used to alter app preferences.

integrity.description: Verify the screenshots represent a genuine Android emulator environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard Android system UI elements (status bar, navigation bar) are present and consistent, indicating a real emulator session.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target UI label is exactly 'Avoid ferries'. The expected state for this setting is ON (enabled), which is visually represented by a toggle switch in the ON/blue state.
